arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Chelsea, PSG, Juventus to challenge Man United for Osimhen
arts.sum: Manchester United face competition for Victor Osimhen, while Barcelona explore a deal to bring Neymar back to Camp Nou. Join us for the latest transfer news, rumours and gossip from around the globe. The 33-year-old only recently joined boyhood club Santos, where he has already scored twice in six league appearances.

arts.ttl: Man Utd Willing to Pay €40M and Player in Package for PSG Transfer Target
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have been linked with Osimhen during the last two transfer windows, and with the summer window still months away, rumors are already starting to heat up. arts.ttl: Liverpool See Brighton’s £100M-Rated Talent as Darwin Nunez Replacement Amid Chelsea, PSG Links
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are among several clubs, including Chelsea, Liverpool, and Bayern Munich, reportedly eyeing João Pedro as the January transfer window approaches. TBR Football’s Graeme Bailey reported last December that Brighton are seeking nearly £100 million for the forward, though they have no intention of selling him anytime soon. arts.ttl: Vinicius Jr. Breaks Silence on Real Madrid Future Amid PSG, Saudi Arabia Links
arts.sum: The Athletic previously reported that Vinicius Jr.’s camp turned down Real Madrid’s initial offer as they aim to secure the Brazilian for the long term, with growing interest from Saudi Arabia. Now, Saudi Arabia is looking to capitalize on this opening, according to a new report.
